meta.title: Clément Maillet
meta.description: Clément Maillet, Full Stack Developer in Brittany, France. Discover my portfolio, skills, projects and contact me for your web, desktop or mobile development needs.
meta.ogDescription: Portfolio of Clément Maillet, Full Stack Developer in Brittany, France. Discover my skills, projects and contact me.
meta.keywords: developer, full stack, brittany, web, react, node.js, portfolio, clement maillet, web development, desktop development, mobile development
meta.jobDescription: Full Stack Developer in Brittany, France

hero.name: Clément Maillet
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description:
A highly motivated Full Stack Developer with an overflowing passion for technological innovation.
Driven by the ambition to create exceptional digital solutions that make a difference.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: Full Stack Developer based in Brittany, I design high-performance web, desktop and mobile applications. <highlight>Demanding and methodical</highlight>, I place great importance on code quality and user experience.
about.paragraph2: Graduated with a Computer Science Bachelor's degree from IUT de Vannes, I am now continuing my studies through a work-study program to obtain a Master's degree, in pursuit of my quest for knowledge.
about.paragraph3: <highlight>Versatile and committed</highlight>, I also have a great fondness for teamwork and management.
about.paragraph4: For me, code is a wonderful way to bring any idea to life.

work.title:
It's a real pleasure
to work together

tasks: Development of several internal applications to improve employee autonomy.
Development of an application to reach new customers on the market with a new offer, allowing users to register without going through Médiamag's professional channels.
Creation of external modules for the company's main application in C++, Python.
Migration of a Symfony application to a new React front-end solution with transformation of the Symfony backend into a REST/JSON API.
Application of the new design on the company's applications.
Project management and coordination via Jira with ticket planning and Kanban methodology.
Maintenance and development of new features on the company's existing applications.

frontend.title: Front-End Development
frontend.description: I enjoy designing modern, fluid and well-structured interfaces. I work with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and TypeScript, mainly using React. I organize my code in a <highlight>modular</highlight> way with reusable components, which allows me to <highlight>maintain</highlight> my interfaces more easily.

backend.title: Back-End Development
backend.description: On the Back-End side, I enjoy exploring different technologies, whether with Java (Spring Boot) or Node.js (Adonis, Nest) to develop <highlight>reliable and well-organized</highlight> APIs. I manage both relational databases like MySQL and document-oriented databases like MongoDB, as well as S3 buckets for server-side file management and backup.

devops.title: DevOps & Tools
devops.description: I use Git daily, an essential tool. I enjoy setting up CI/CD pipelines for my personal projects, with <highlight>automatic deployments</highlight> to my VPS. I also use Docker to isolate my development environments and facilitate deployment.

listening.title: Listening Skills
listening.description: I take the time to fully understand user needs in order to propose <highlight>adapted technical solutions</highlight>. This attentive listening allows me to better meet expectations and collaborate effectively.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: I greatly appreciate teamwork and sharing my knowledge to foster <highlight>collective growth</highlight>. I like to take the lead and organize development as I have done on personal team projects and professionally.

curious.title: Curious
curious.description1: I have a real <highlight>thirst for learning</highlight>, I enjoy discovering new technologies, exploring environments I don't know yet, and stepping out of my comfort zone.
curious.description2: For me, every novelty is an opportunity to learn, progress and adapt!

volunteer.title: Digital Footprint Workshop Volunteer
volunteer.description: I volunteer for 'La Fresque du Numérique', I was trained as a workshop facilitator. I enjoy raising awareness about the <highlight>environmental challenges</highlight> of digital technology and sharing my knowledge to encourage more responsible practices in our sector.

pokemonStudio.description: Pokémon Studio is an <highlight>open source web application</highlight> that allows you to create your own Pokémon game. This tool is fully customizable, allowing the user to create a unique Pokémon game. I contribute to the project in my free time with a <highlight>distributed team</highlight> following an agile methodology (Scrumban) adapted to the project context, sprint meetings and task distribution.

todaysFlag.description: Today's Flag is a <highlight>fun web application</highlight> that allows you to try to guess the country hidden behind a flag every day. This makes it easier to remember the flags of all the countries in the world. I created this application with Next.js to experiment with the <highlight>framework</highlight>.

contact.title: Contact
contact.emailInfo: Or contact me directly by email:
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact.errorMessage: An error occurred while sending the message.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.hostingNote: Website hosted on virtual private server (VPS)
legal.intellectualProperty1: This entire website is subject to French and international legislation on copyright and intellectual property. All reproduction rights are reserved, including for downloadable documents and iconographic and photographic representations.
legal.intellectualProperty2: Reproduction of all or part of this website on any electronic medium is strictly prohibited without express authorization from the publication director.
legal.personalData1: Information collected via the contact form is used solely to respond to your requests. It is neither sold nor transferred to third parties.
legal.personalData2: In accordance with the French Data Protection Act of January 6, 1978 and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data.
legal.cookiesIntro: This website uses the following services:
legal.cookiesUmami: Privacy-friendly web analytics tool that collects anonymous visitor statistics (pages visited, traffic source, browser type). Umami uses no cookies, collects no personal data and does not enable cross-site tracking.
legal.cookiesRecaptcha: Anti-spam protection for the contact form. These cookies verify that you are not a robot.
legal.cookiesEmailjs: Email sending service for the contact form.
legal.cookiesNote1: reCAPTCHA and EmailJS cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of the contact form and website security. They are not used for analytics or advertising tracking purposes.
legal.cookiesNote2: You can configure your browser to refuse these cookies, but this may affect the functionality of the contact form.
legal.liability1: The information contained on this website is as accurate as possible and the website is updated at various times throughout the year, but may nevertheless contain inaccuracies or omissions.
legal.liability2: If you notice any gap, error or what appears to be a malfunction, please report it by email to clement.maillet56@gmail.com, describing the problem as precisely as possible.
legal.accessibility: This website strives to comply with web accessibility standards. For any difficulty accessing content or suggestions for improvement, you can contact us at: clement.maillet56@gmail.com
legal.law: These legal notices are subject to French law. Any dispute relating to the use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.
